tasks.fmt: deno fmt --check deno.json sigil.config examples/promise/sigil.config examples/slotted/sigil.config spec/sigil-config.schema.json packages/sigil-core/deno.json packages/sigil-core/src packages/sigil-core/tests packages/sigil-cli/deno.json packages/sigil-cli/src packages/sigil-cli/tests packages/sigil-lsp/deno.json packages/sigil-lsp/src packages/sigil-lsp/tests integrations/editor/vscode/package.json integrations/editor/vscode/tsconfig.json integrations/editor/vscode/language-configuration.json integrations/editor/vscode/syntaxes integrations/editor/vscode/src integrations/editor/vscode/tests integrations/editor/vscode/scripts integrations/editor/vscode/esbuild.mjs scripts
tasks.check: deno check packages/sigil-core/src/mod.ts packages/sigil-cli/src/main.ts packages/sigil-lsp/src/main.ts && deno task check:vscode
tasks.test: deno task test:core && deno task test:cli && deno task test:lsp && deno task test:vscode && deno task test:vscode:extension && deno task test:skill
tasks.publish:dry-run: deno task --cwd packages/sigil-core publish:dry-run && deno task --cwd packages/sigil-cli publish:dry-run && deno task --cwd packages/sigil-lsp publish:dry-run && deno task package:vscode
